title: Digest items
description: One ordered slot in a digest — a chosen article with the curator's blurb and its topic bucket.

digestId.description: the digest this slot belongs to

articleId.description: the article featured in this slot

topicSlug.description: the topic bucket this slot is filed under (matches a topics.slug / articles.tags entry)

position.description: display order within the digest; lower = higher up

blurb.description: the curator's one-line 'why this matters' for the slot

digest.description: the digest this slot is part of

article.description: the article featured in this slot
